message:
fsqlite-core: share prepared cache template payloads

Use Rc-backed canonical SQL and precompiled DML metadata on prepared-cache hits for the mt_mvcc_bench-style insert prepare cycle.

Bench prepared_cache_hot_paths:
- mt_mvcc_prepare_hit_ns_per_op: 335.33 -> 161.08
- mt_mvcc_prepare_then_execute_cycle_ns_per_op: 1393.33 -> 1086.38
